features.name: OR reduction of replicated wire
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration using replication operator followed by OR reduction applied to that wire

features.name: AND reduction of replicated wire
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration using replication operator followed by AND reduction applied to that wire

features.name: replication with reduction optimization
features.description: Code should include both a replicated wire declaration and a reduction operation that can be canonicalized to the replicated value itself
